name: website-deploy
description: Deploy static websites to simple-host.app from your coding agent (inline JSON or tar.gz/zip). Each site gets a per-site backend (shared JSON state with atomic ops, append-only collections, drop-in comments/feedback widgets, templates), built-in server-side visitor analytics, and can be connected to your own custom domain — subdomain via CNAME or apex via A record — with automatic HTTPS and private/password pages. Bundles a builder skill (plan what to build) and a connect-domain skill.
